inputs.label: Current Age of Child
inputs.businessContext: Age of the child to plan savings for education

inputs.label: Years Until College Starts
inputs.businessContext: Number of years remaining before the child begins college

inputs.label: Current Annual Cost of Education
inputs.businessContext: Today's annual tuition and related expenses

inputs.label: Education Inflation Rate
inputs.businessContext: Expected annual increase in education costs

inputs.label: Expected Investment Return Rate
inputs.businessContext: Annual rate of return on savings investments

inputs.label: Monthly Contribution Amount
inputs.businessContext: Regular monthly savings contribution until college begins

inputs.label: Duration of Study
inputs.businessContext: Expected number of years the child will attend college

formulas.totalCost: annualCost * Math.pow(1 + inflationRate/100, yearsUntilCollege) * (Math.pow(1 + inflationRate/100, durationOfStudy) - 1) / (inflationRate/100)
formulas.totalSavings: currentSavings * Math.pow(1 + returnRate/100, yearsUntilCollege) + (monthlyContribution * 12) * ((Math.pow(1 + returnRate/100, yearsUntilCollege) - 1) / (returnRate/100))
